front: What is the significance of the Human Genome Project for peptides?
back: HGP (1990-2003) mapped all human genes. Impact on peptides: 1) Identified ~20,000 protein-coding genes (many encode peptides), 2) Enabled genome-wide peptide discovery, 3) Facilitated personalized peptide therapeutics, 4) Provided reference for genetic variants affecting peptide function, 5) Accelerated biomarker discovery.
